title: Noble Musketeers
overview: The Musketeers vow to fight back against the World Empire. A rescue mission provides the perfect opportunity to strike a blow to the tyrannical regime.

title: Supreme Nobility
overview: After recovering from the last mission, Brown Bess and his friends try to discover the secret of Supreme Nobility. Can the other musketeers give them the insight they seek?

title: Soul Weapon
overview: Intel points the musketeers towards an armory inside an ancient castle, but a disturbing rumor could complicate matters.

title: Town
overview: The musketeers establish a resistance network in a port town, but cooperation from their new allies requires a trade. What is the price for the aid of the populace?

title: Rescue
overview: Ekaterina and Aleksandr travel by train after a successful mission. The trip is uneventful, but for a musketeer, that usually means danger lies just beyond the horizon.

title: Smile
overview: Geweer’s temper is well known, but that doesn’t stop easy-going Hall from making conversation. Is this the start of a friendship?

title: Negotiations
overview: Margarita and Leopold await reinforcements, who turn out to be none other than Napoleon and Charleville. Can they assist in retrieving an antique gun from a powerful man?

title: Adventure
overview: Ever since Napoleon left on a mission, Nicola and Noel have been playing pranks out of sheer boredom. What kind of trouble will they get into during their next escapade?

title: Genius
overview: Shortly after four new musketeers are awakened, the resistance comes to the conclusion that the Empire is about to deploy Myrrha, a terrifying weapon of mass destruction.

title: Total War
overview: The Empire launches an all-out assault on the musketeers’ home base. Can our heroes repel this relentless attack, or will the resistance fall with them?

title: Destiny
overview: From the very beginning, Brown Bess was there to shepherd the other musketeers and give them guidance along the way. How far will he go to protect the ones he cares about?

title: Be Noble
overview: A lull in battle allows for needed introspection. The World Empire is still out there, but one thing is certain: The noble spirit of the musketeer shall never die.
